caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, spiked grey wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears black-rimmed glasses and large over-ear headphones. The scene is set in a room with walls decorated with numerous framed photographs. A microphone is positioned in the foreground, and the logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. To the man's left, there are white shelving units and a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expression slightly. His head tilts subtly and his mouth moves as he continues to talk, while the background and equipment remain static.
